name: manual_sdpa_decomposition
description: Replace torch.nn.functional.scaled_dot_product_attention with manual baddbmm+softmax+bmm. On B200, SDPA dispatches to sm80 cutlass FMHA kernel. Manual decomposition triggers sm100-native cuBLAS kernels.
when_to_apply: Attention ops on B200 where SDPA uses non-native kernels. Check with ncu if the kernel name contains 'sm80'.
